articles.title: Laid-off GM employees tell of ominous email, severance and role of AI
articles.summary: General Motors employees who were laid off Monday described their job terminations to CNBC.

articles.title: Marty Makary resigns as FDA commissioner following industry and White House backlash

articles.summary: The summer box office is off to a sizzling start, thanks in part to strong week-after-week performance from returning titles.
